activation_results.reason: Create is a direct synonym of Build; rest of phrase matches the description.
User explicitly invokes the skill by its exact name.
SSH key forwarding is unrelated to Meta audiences.
A meta question about skills in general is out of scope for building Meta audiences.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: Narrative uses AU-compatible spelling (no American variants present); date format 11/04/2026 is DD/MM/YYYY and country code AU.

criterion_results.text: Artefact is a working specification, not a hypothetical or placeholder
criterion_results.evidence: Concrete ad account act_1234567890, pixel id, named audiences with sizes, retentions, statuses, and a campaign-use matrix.
Includes Retargeting audiences, Lookalike audiences, Exclusion audiences, Campaign use matrix, and Next steps sections.

judge_result.notes: Example artefact is a concrete, ready-to-activate Meta audiences specification with retargeting, lookalike, and exclusion audience tables, a campaign use matrix mapping includes/excludes per campaign type, and actionable next steps. Date format and country targeting align with Australian conventions; no American spellings appear.
